requirement_topic.en: AZSTAND Mandatory Conformity Certification — Azerbaijan National Market Access Route (NOT EAEU / NOT EAC TR CU)
requirement_topic.zh: AZSTAND强制符合性认证——阿塞拜疆国家市场准入路径（非EAEU / 非EAC TR CU）
requirement_topic.zht: AZSTAND強制符合性認證——亞塞拜疆國家市場准入路徑（非EAEU / 非EAC TR CU）

summary.en: CRITICAL MARKET STRUCTURE NOTE: Azerbaijan is NOT a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU). EAC conformity marking (EAC TR CU) under the EAEU technical regulations — including TR CU 004/2011 (Low voltage equipment safety) and TR CU 020/2011 (EMC) — does NOT apply to Azerbaijan and does NOT grant Azerbaijan market access. The mandatory conformity route for electrical products in Azerbaijan is through AZSTAND (State Committee for Standardization, Metrology and Patents of Azerbaijan, also referred to as 'Azstandart'). AZSTAND operates mandatory conformity certification for regulated electrical products placed on the Azerbaijan market. PV inverters falling within AZSTAND's current mandatory certification scope require an AZSTAND certificate of conformity before import or sale. The applicant (local importer, authorized representative, or manufacturer) must engage an AZSTAND-accredited conformity assessment body, provide technical documentation and test reports based on applicable AZS national standards (GOST/IEC-derived), and mark the product accordingly. AZSTAND publishes the list of products subject to mandatory certification at azstand.gov.az. The exact mandatory scope for PV inverters must be verified with AZSTAND before shipment as the scope can change.
summary.zh: 关键市场结构说明：阿塞拜疆不是欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员国。欧亚经济联盟技术法规下的EAC合格标志（EAC TR CU）——包括TR CU 004/2011（低压设备安全）和TR CU 020/2011（EMC）——不适用于阿塞拜疆，不授予阿塞拜疆市场准入。阿塞拜疆电气产品的强制符合性路径通过AZSTAND（阿塞拜疆标准化、计量和专利国家委员会，亦称「Azstandart」）进行。AZSTAND对投放阿塞拜疆市场的受监管电气产品实施强制符合性认证。属于AZSTAND现行强制认证范围的光伏逆变器在进口或销售前需取得AZSTAND符合性证书。申请人（当地进口商、授权代表或制造商）须委托AZSTAND认可的符合性评估机构，提供基于适用AZS国家标准（GOST/IEC衍生）的技术文件和测试报告，并对产品进行相应标识。AZSTAND在azstand.gov.az发布需强制认证的产品清单。光伏逆变器的确切强制范围须在出货前向AZSTAND核实，因为范围可能发生变化。
summary.zht: 關鍵市場結構說明：亞塞拜疆不是歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員國。歐亞經濟聯盟技術法規下的EAC合格標誌（EAC TR CU）——包括TR CU 004/2011（低壓設備安全）和TR CU 020/2011（EMC）——不適用於亞塞拜疆，不授予亞塞拜疆市場准入。亞塞拜疆電氣產品的強制符合性路徑通過AZSTAND（亞塞拜疆標準化、計量和專利國家委員會，亦稱「Azstandart」）進行。AZSTAND對投放亞塞拜疆市場的受監管電氣產品實施強制符合性認證。屬於AZSTAND現行強制認證範圍的光伏逆變器在進口或銷售前需取得AZSTAND符合性證書。申請人（當地進口商、授權代表或製造商）須委託AZSTAND認可的符合性評估機構，提供基於適用AZS國家標準（GOST/IEC衍生）的技術文件和測試報告，並對產品進行相應標識。AZSTAND在azstand.gov.az發布需強制認證的產品清單。光伏逆變器的確切強制範圍須在出貨前向AZSTAND核實，因為範圍可能發生變化。

standards_or_laws: AZS national standards (GOST/IEC-derived) for electrical equipment safety and EMC — adopted by AZSTAND
AZSTAND mandatory conformity certification list and procedures — azstand.gov.az
Azerbaijan Law on Technical Regulation and Technical Requirements for Products
IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 — may be referenced as the basis for AZS-adopted safety standards for PV inverters
NOTE: EAC TR CU 004/2011 and TR CU 020/2011 are EAEU regulations and do NOT apply to Azerbaijan

summary.en: China-side PV inverter conformity commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021, manufacturer safety testing, and IEC 62109 CB scheme reports for export. These are useful due-diligence inputs for building an AZSTAND technical documentation package but do not substitute for the mandatory Azerbaijan conformity certificate, AZSTAND-accredited-body testing, or marking obligations. Chinese exporters who have obtained EAC TR CU certificates for EAEU markets (Kazakhstan, Russia, etc.) must not assume these certificates are valid in Azerbaijan — they are not, because Azerbaijan is outside the EAEU.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器符合性通常依据GB/T 37408-2021、制造商安全测试以及出口用IEC 62109 CB认证报告。这些可作为建立AZSTAND技术文件包的有效尽调输入，但不能替代阿塞拜疆强制符合性证书、AZSTAND认可机构测试或标识义务。已为EAEU市场（哈萨克斯坦、俄罗斯等）取得EAC TR CU证书的中国出口商不得假设这些证书在阿塞拜疆有效——因为阿塞拜疆不在EAEU范围内，这些证书在阿塞拜疆无效。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器符合性通常依據GB/T 37408-2021、製造商安全測試以及出口用IEC 62109 CB認證報告。這些可作為建立AZSTAND技術文件包的有效盡調輸入，但不能替代亞塞拜疆強制符合性證書、AZSTAND認可機構測試或標識義務。已為EAEU市場（哈薩克斯坦、俄羅斯等）取得EAC TR CU證書的中國出口商不得假設這些證書在亞塞拜疆有效——因為亞塞拜疆不在EAEU範圍內，這些證書在亞塞拜疆無效。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 — CB scheme certificates (where held by the manufacturer for export markets)
NOTE: EAC TR CU certificates held for EAEU markets are NOT valid in Azerbaijan

gap.en: Gap: The primary gap for Chinese PV inverter exporters targeting Azerbaijan is establishing the correct domestic market-access route through AZSTAND — not assuming EAEU EAC TR CU certification applies. Key actions: (a) determine whether the specific inverter falls within AZSTAND's current mandatory certification scope by checking azstand.gov.az or contacting AZSTAND directly; (b) if in scope, identify a local importer, authorized representative, or in-country applicant to hold the AZSTAND certificate; (c) engage an AZSTAND-accredited conformity assessment body for testing against applicable AZS / GOST / IEC-derived standards; (d) prepare technical documentation in Azerbaijani or Russian language as required by AZSTAND procedures; (e) do not assume EAC TR CU certificates obtained for EAEU markets (Kazakhstan, Russia, Belarus, etc.) provide any legal basis for Azerbaijan market access — they do not. IEC 62109 CB scheme certificates and IEC test reports can support the AZSTAND conformity documentation but do not replace the AZSTAND certificate where one is required.
gap.zh: 差距：面向阿塞拜疆的中国光伏逆变器出口商的主要差距是通过AZSTAND建立正确的国内市场准入路径——而非假设EAEU EAC TR CU认证适用。关键行动：（a）通过访问azstand.gov.az或直接联系AZSTAND，确认特定逆变器是否在AZSTAND现行强制认证范围内；（b）如在范围内，确定当地进口商、授权代表或境内申请人持有AZSTAND证书；（c）委托AZSTAND认可的符合性评估机构依据适用AZS/GOST/IEC标准进行测试；（d）按AZSTAND程序要求准备阿塞拜疆语或俄语技术文件；（e）不要假设为EAEU市场（哈萨克斯坦、俄罗斯、白俄罗斯等）取得的EAC TR CU证书对阿塞拜疆市场准入提供任何法律依据——实际上不提供。IEC 62109 CB认证证书和IEC测试报告可支持AZSTAND符合性文件，但在需要AZSTAND证书的情况下不能替代该证书。
gap.zht: 差距：面向亞塞拜疆的中國光伏逆變器出口商的主要差距是通過AZSTAND建立正確的國內市場准入路徑——而非假設EAEU EAC TR CU認證適用。關鍵行動：（a）通過訪問azstand.gov.az或直接聯繫AZSTAND，確認特定逆變器是否在AZSTAND現行強制認證範圍內；（b）如在範圍內，確定當地進口商、授權代表或境內申請人持有AZSTAND證書；（c）委託AZSTAND認可的符合性評估機構依據適用AZS/GOST/IEC標準進行測試；（d）按AZSTAND程序要求準備亞塞拜疆語或俄語技術文件；（e）不要假設為EAEU市場（哈薩克斯坦、俄羅斯、白俄羅斯等）取得的EAC TR CU證書對亞塞拜疆市場准入提供任何法律依據——實際上不提供。IEC 62109 CB認證證書和IEC測試報告可支持AZSTAND符合性文件，但在需要AZSTAND證書的情況下不能替代該證書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter is within AZSTAND's mandatory certification scope for regulated electrical products; exact PV inverter scope must be confirmed with AZSTAND before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-specific for GB/T 37408-2021; IEC 62109 used for international certification export evidence; EAC TR CU certificates valid only in EAEU member states, NOT in Azerbaijan

source.publisher: State Committee for Standardization, Metrology and Patents of Azerbaijan (AZSTAND)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Azerbaijan is NOT an EAEU member — EAC TR CU certification does not grant Azerbaijan market access. Treat AZSTAND mandatory conformity certification as the primary Azerbaijan domestic market-access gate for regulated electrical products. Verify whether the inverter is in AZSTAND's current mandatory scope at azstand.gov.az and engage a local applicant and AZSTAND-accredited body before shipment. GB/T 37408 or IEC 62109 reports support the technical file but do not replace the AZSTAND certificate where one is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿塞拜疆不是EAEU成员国——EAC TR CU认证不授予阿塞拜疆市场准入。应将AZSTAND强制符合性认证视为受监管电气产品的阿塞拜疆国内市场准入主要门槛。出货前请在azstand.gov.az核实逆变器是否在AZSTAND现行强制范围内，并委托当地申请人和AZSTAND认可机构。GB/T 37408或IEC 62109报告支持技术文件，但在需要AZSTAND证书的情况下不能替代该证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞塞拜疆不是EAEU成員國——EAC TR CU認證不授予亞塞拜疆市場准入。應將AZSTAND強制符合性認證視為受監管電氣產品的亞塞拜疆國內市場准入主要門檻。出貨前請在azstand.gov.az核實逆變器是否在AZSTAND現行強制範圍內，並委託當地申請人和AZSTAND認可機構。GB/T 37408或IEC 62109報告支持技術文件，但在需要AZSTAND證書的情況下不能替代該證書。
